## CVE Findings

### HIGH: swagger-parser 2.1.21 — CVE-2024-31573 (tracked in #71)
Status: Open — fix not yet applied.  
Detail: XML external entity (XXE) injection via maliciously crafted OpenAPI YAML.  
Fix: Upgrade to `swagger-parser` 2.1.22+.

### MEDIUM: logback-classic 1.4.14 — EOL branch
Status: New finding.  
Detail: 1.4.x branch is EOL and receives no further security patches.  
Fix: Upgrade to `logback-classic` 1.5.18.

### MEDIUM: jackson-databind 2.17.0 — outdated patch version
Status: New finding.  
Detail: Running on the oldest patch release of an actively-maintained security library.  
Fix: Upgrade to `jackson-databind` 2.17.3` or 2.18.3.
